name: Diabetic Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together; set aside.
2. Beat eggs and skim milk; add to flour. Beat until smooth and creamy.
3. Pour into heated greased muffin tins, filling half full or less.
4. Bake at 375°F for 50 minutes, or until popovers are golden brown and sound hollow.
Note: DO NOT OPEN THE OVEN FOR THE FIRST 40 MINUTES of baking. Serving size: 1/2 serving equals 1/8 bread calories with 44 net carbohydrates.
